description: Style NoteBeat the summer heat with sepia's new range of tops. If light colours, comfortable material and fashionable styles is just what you looking for then then this would be the right choice. These stylish and feminine tops could be worn with a pair of black tights or leggings to bring out the intricacies of the top.Product DetailsGrey half sleeve top made of light  100 % cotton material, the sleeves have a slight puff with embroidery details, the top has a V-neck collar with embroidered details at the yoke and waist and a fabric belt at the backMaterial and CareRinse seperatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery & printDry on reverse side under sunIron at low temperatureSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
